pi_items.source: Task instructions in task.json explicitly require setting the number of clusters to 5.
Task instructions in task.json explicitly require this output path.
Task instructions in task.json explicitly require exporting the GeoTIFF to this path.

setup_task.sh downloads landsat.tif from raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif. Reading the file with rasterio confirms its TIFF tags include Earth Engine Landsat 7 (LANDSAT_LE7_TOA) licensing information.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 satellite imagery downloaded from the opengeos/data GitHub repository. The task instructions explicitly require configuring K-Means clustering with 5 clusters. The output files must be saved as /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_kmeans_classified.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_kmeans_classified.tif.
